description: Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ) — Brain mapping and role definitions. Roles are managed here; NPC assignment is done by attaching the matching role script (modules/tacz/roles/<roleId>.js) directly to the NPC in CNPC.

squad_leader.description: Commanding officer. Coordinates the squad, issues orders, and maintains tactical awareness.

soldier.description: Standard infantry. Executes orders from the squad leader and engages threats on sight.

rifleman.description: Standard infantry soldier. Engages targets at medium range.

sniper.description: Long-range specialist. Holds position and eliminates priority targets.

support.description: Heavy weapons or logistics. Suppresses enemies and resupplies allies.

_npc_assignments_note: NPC-to-role assignment is no longer done here. Assign the role script directly to the NPC in CNPC: modules/tacz/roles/<roleId>.js. The role script loads the full system and handles all events automatically.
